title: capability packet schema
description: Language-agnostic contract for a request from the bridge to the SDL capability layer. See Sources/CapabilityBridge/CapabilityBridge.swift for the Swift reference implementation.

mode.description: Interaction mode (e.g. dry-run, execute, plan, review).

selectedCapability.description: Identifier of the capability being invoked, if a route has been selected.

invocationMode.description: Whether the capability should actually mutate state.

contextBundleRef.description: Reference to the ContextBundle that accompanies this packet.

authorityScope.description: Authority tokens or scopes granted to this invocation.

allowMutation.description: True if the capability is permitted to mutate state.

expectedOutputs.description: Names or references of outputs the caller expects.
